ambiguities.requirement: The system shall provide suitable food suggestions if the analysis indicates an unhealthy diet.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall analyze the information entered by the user.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system will perform this analysis. It only mentions that based on the result of an unspecified process, the user may be identified.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide food suggestions if the analysis indicates an unhealthy diet.

The source text mentions that food suggestions are provided based on the result of the analysis, but this is not explicitly stated in the rewritten requirements.
